title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Annual Investment Plan Cy 2020 of the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office (MDRRMO) Under the Office of the Mayor Amounting to Two Million Six Hundred Ninety Thousand Six Hundred Fifteen and 76 / 100 (P 2, 690,615.76) for the Reversion of Unexpended 30% Quick Response Mdrrm Fund Fy 2014 to General Fund for Other Social Services Particularly for Assistance to Individuals in Crisis Situation. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 02/14/2020)
